headline: Arch Capital (ACGL) Promotes Jerome Halgan and Michael Schmeiser to CEO Roles
summary: Arch Capital Group Ltd. (NASDAQ:ACGL) is one of the 10 Most Undervalued NASDAQ Stocks to Buy Right Now. On June 17, Arch Capital announced the promotions of Jerome Halgan to CEO of Arch Global Reinsurance Group and Michael Schmeiser to CEO of Arch Global Mortgage Group. Both executives, who have held senior leadership roles within […]
